faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: CDNCore provides comprehensive technology solutions including cybersecurity, AI & intelligent automation, big data analytics, advanced R&D, and full-stack software development.
faq.a2: We employ a multi-layered defense strategy including penetration testing, server hardening, DDoS protection, firewall configuration, and continuous monitoring to safeguard your digital infrastructure.
faq.q3: Can CDNCore integrate AI into existing systems?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We specialize in deploying custom AI solutions that seamlessly integrate with your existing infrastructure, from smart business assistants to workflow automation and NLP services.
faq.a4: We serve diverse industries including finance, insurance, healthcare, telecommunications, and enterprise technology, delivering tailored solutions for each sector's unique challenges.

capabilities.label: TECHNICAL
capabilities.heading: Capabilities
capabilities.sidebar_intro: We combine cutting-edge technology with industry expertise to deliver transformative solutions
capabilities.cyber_hiscox: Hiscox is a global specialist insurer focused on professional indemnity, high-value assets, and complex business risks. Known for its premium service and efficient claims handling, the company serves a diverse international clientele. Cdncore is the partner responsible for Hiscox's cybersecurity, ensuring the protection of its digital infrastructure and the integrity of its global data operations against evolving cyber threats.
capabilities.c1_desc: Cutting-edge information security solutions, penetration testing, server hardening, and design of stable network architectures and secure communications to counter modern threats.
capabilities.c2_desc: Deploy custom AI solutions to automate complex workflows, enhance customer support with smart agents, and drive operational efficiency securely within your infrastructure.
capabilities.c3_desc: Transform raw data into actionable business intelligence. We implement scalable algorithms for forecasting, risk assessment, and behavioral analysis to empower decision-making.
capabilities.c4_desc: Our R&D division focuses on solving complex, large-scale challenges by pioneering advancements across the entire technology stack. From intelligent edge computing and IoT architectures to data-driven AI and next-generation network design, we build the foundational systems of tomorrow.

hww.title: HOW WE WORK
hww.step1_desc: We analyze your business needs and technical requirements to create a tailored strategy.
hww.step2_desc: Our team creates intuitive, user-centered designs that align with your brand identity.
hww.step3_desc: We build robust, scalable solutions using cutting-edge technologies and best practices.
hww.step4_desc: Seamless deployment with continuous integration and monitoring for optimal performance.
hww.step5_desc: Ongoing support and optimization to ensure your solution evolves with your needs.

commitments.hero_subtitle: Dedicated to ethical innovation, exceptional talent, and transformative technology that benefits humanity

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Building innovative technology that empowers organizations worldwide
mission.belief: We believe technology should serve humanity, not the other way around.
mission.service1_desc: Protecting digital infrastructure against evolving threats
mission.service3_desc: Transforming raw data into actionable insights
mission.advantage_desc: With deep expertise across cybersecurity, AI, and data science, we deliver comprehensive solutions that address the full spectrum of modern enterprise challenges.
mission.beyond_tech_desc: We are committed to ethical innovation, sustainable practices, and creating technology that makes a positive impact on society.

team.label: Team
team.subtitle: Meet the brilliant minds behind CDNCORE's groundbreaking innovations
team.quote: Together, we can face any challenges as deep as the ocean and as high as the sky.
team.m1_bio: Sérgio the CEO and Founder of CDN and Co-Founder of Privant. He also works as an official cameraman for the European Commission and the Council of the European Union.
team.m2_bio: Mehran, IEEE Sr. Member, holds a Ph.D. in Computer Eng. As a R&D, bringing expertise in AI, ML, Cyber Security, Cloud Security, and Data Science.
team.m3_bio: Guilherme holds a Bachelor's Degree in Web Informatics and a Master's Degree in Computer Science with a specialization in AI. Previously worked as a Junior Python Developer at Phillip Morris International.
team.m4_bio: Henrique is a talented Software Engineer contributing to the development and innovation at CDNCORE with a focus on cutting-edge technologies.

ethics.label: Ethics & Principles
ethics.subtitle: The ethical foundation that drives our innovation
ethics.p1_detail: We maintain open communication with our clients, partners, and team members. Every decision is made with clarity and accountability.
ethics.p2_detail: We treat data as a sacred trust. Our security protocols exceed industry standards, ensuring that sensitive information remains protected at all times.
ethics.p3_detail: We develop AI systems that are fair, explainable, and free from harmful biases. Our AI ethics framework guides every project.
ethics.p4_detail: Technology should serve everyone. We design solutions that are accessible and beneficial to diverse communities and users.
ethics.p5_detail: We optimize our infrastructure for energy efficiency and actively seek ways to reduce the environmental impact of our technology.
ethics.p6_detail: We invest in our team continuous education and stay at the forefront of technological advancements to deliver the best solutions.
ethics.p7_detail: We believe in giving back. Through mentorship, open-source contributions, and community initiatives, we work to uplift the tech ecosystem.

collab.label: Our Values
collab.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
collab.v1_desc: Pushing boundaries with cutting-edge research and development to create solutions that define the future of technology.
collab.v2_desc: Building strong partnerships and fostering teamwork to deliver comprehensive solutions that exceed expectations.
collab.v3_desc: Creating technology with a conscience, ensuring our innovations contribute positively to society and the environment.

cta.subtitle: Join us in building technology that makes a difference. Whether you're a client, partner, or future team member, we'd love to connect.

services_page.hero_subtitle: From hardened cybersecurity to agentic AI, we deliver end-to-end technology solutions built for the demands of modern enterprise.
services_page.cyber_desc: We protect your digital infrastructure with a multi-layered defence strategy — from penetration testing and server hardening to real-time threat monitoring and secure communications, keeping your operations resilient against evolving cyber threats.
services_page.cyber_o1_desc: Design robust perimeter controls, micro-segmentation, and zero-trust network designs tailored to your environment.
services_page.cyber_o2_desc: Real-time traffic scrubbing and rate-limiting strategies to absorb volumetric, protocol, and application-layer attacks.
services_page.cyber_o3_desc: Ethical hacking engagements — black-box, grey-box, and white-box — to uncover vulnerabilities before attackers do.
services_page.cyber_o4_desc: Expert deployment and tuning of next-generation firewalls, IDS/IPS rules, and unified threat management systems.
services_page.cyber_o5_desc: Encrypted SIP and WebRTC communications with fraud detection and QoS policies for enterprise voice networks.
services_page.cyber_o6_desc: Rapid containment, forensic analysis, and post-incident reporting to minimise downtime and business impact.
services_page.cyber_o7_desc: Gap analysis and remediation roadmaps aligned with GDPR, ISO 27001, NIS2, and sector-specific frameworks.
services_page.cyber_case_text: Hiscox is a global specialist insurer focused on professional indemnity, high-value assets, and complex business risks. Known for its premium service and efficient claims handling, the company serves a diverse international clientele. CDNCore is the partner responsible for Hiscox's cybersecurity, ensuring the protection of its digital infrastructure and the integrity of its global data operations against evolving cyber threats.
services_page.ai_desc: We deploy custom AI solutions that automate complex workflows, enhance customer interactions with smart agents, and drive measurable operational efficiency — all deployed securely within your own infrastructure.
services_page.ai_o1_desc: Custom LLM deployment, fine-tuning, and RAG pipelines tailored to your business knowledge and processes.
services_page.ai_o2_desc: AI-powered chatbots and virtual agents for customer support, internal helpdesks, and decision augmentation.
services_page.ai_o3_desc: ML-driven process automation that learns from your data, reducing manual intervention and operational overhead.
services_page.ai_o4_desc: Document classification, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and multilingual content processing.
services_page.ai_o5_desc: Image and video analysis pipelines for quality control, identity verification, and industrial inspection.
services_page.ai_o6_desc: Governance frameworks, maturity assessments, and technology roadmaps for responsible enterprise AI adoption.
services_page.data_desc: We transform raw data into actionable business intelligence — implementing scalable pipelines for forecasting, risk modelling, and behavioural analysis that empower faster, evidence-based decision-making.
services_page.data_o1_desc: Supervised and unsupervised ML models for demand forecasting, churn prediction, and financial risk scoring.
services_page.data_o2_desc: Real-time KPI dashboards and executive reporting built on modern BI stacks with drill-down and alerting.
services_page.data_o3_desc: ETL/ELT design, data lake architecture, and streaming pipelines on cloud or on-premise infrastructure.
services_page.data_o4_desc: Continuous monitoring models that surface unusual signals in operational, financial, or user-behaviour data.
services_page.data_o5_desc: Advanced hypothesis testing, A/B experimentation, and causal inference for product and strategy decisions.
services_page.data_o6_desc: Feature engineering, model selection, and interpretability guidance to maximise the value of your data assets.
services_page.rd_desc: Our R&D division tackles complex, large-scale challenges — from intelligent edge computing and IoT architectures to next-generation network design and emerging technology integration. We build the foundational systems of tomorrow.
services_page.rd_o1_desc: Smart sensor networks, MQTT/CoAP messaging, and edge AI inference for industrial and commercial IoT deployments.
services_page.rd_o2_desc: Custom MLOps infrastructure, model registries, and feature stores for scalable, reproducible AI operations.
services_page.rd_o3_desc: Applied research into SD-WAN, 5G slicing, and software-defined networking for next-generation connectivity.
services_page.rd_o4_desc: Rapid prototyping of novel technology ideas — from architecture validation to working demos — in compressed timelines.
services_page.rd_o5_desc: Strategic guidance on emerging technology investments: quantum readiness, neuromorphic computing, and beyond.
services_page.rd_o6_desc: Hands-on integration of cutting-edge tools and platforms into existing enterprise stacks with minimal disruption.
services_page.expert_bio: IEEE Senior Member and Ph.D. in Computer Engineering, Dr. Pourvahab leads CDNCore's R&D division and serves as our Chief Information Security Officer. His work spans advanced AI research, cloud security architecture, and applied data science — bringing academic rigour and real-world engineering to every engagement.
services_page.expert_d1_desc: Applied ML research, model development, and academic-grade experimentation for enterprise use cases.
services_page.expert_d2_desc: Executive-level security leadership: policy design, risk governance, and board-level reporting.
services_page.expert_d3_desc: Securing multi-cloud and hybrid environments with IAM, CSPM, and cloud-native security controls.
services_page.expert_d4_desc: Statistical modelling, feature engineering, and advanced analytics from research to production.
services_page.expert_d5_desc: NLP model design, multilingual processing pipelines, and language-AI integration at scale.
services_page.expert_d6_desc: Enterprise network design and MikroTik training and certification for teams and organisations.
services_page.expert_coming_soon: Detailed service packages by Dr. Pourvahab are being prepared — contact us to discuss your specific needs.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_text: CDNCore collects information you provide directly, such as when you fill out a contact form, subscribe to our newsletter, or communicate with us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and company information.
privacy.s2_text: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, communicate with you, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s2_li1: To respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
privacy.s2_li2: To send you technical notices, updates, and administrative messages
privacy.s2_li3: To detect, prevent, and address technical issues
privacy.s3_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.s4_text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also object to or restrict certain processing of your data.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_text: By accessing and using CDNCore's services and website, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.
terms.s2_text: CDNCore provides technology consulting, cybersecurity solutions, AI development, data analytics, and related services. The specific scope of services will be defined in individual agreements.
terms.s3_text: All content, logos, designs, and materials on this website are the property of CDNCore and are protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.
terms.s4_text: CDNCore shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services or website.
terms.s5_text: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Portugal, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms.contact_text: For questions about these Terms, contact us at:

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.s1_text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience and understand how you interact with our site.
cookies.t1_purpose: Required for the website to function properly
cookies.t2_purpose: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website
cookies.t3_purpose: Remember your settings and preferences (e.g., language)
cookies.s3_text: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Please note that removing or blocking cookies may impact your experience on our website.
cookies.s4_text: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages, such as analytics providers. We do not control these third-party cookies.
cookies.contact_text: For questions about our use of cookies, contact us at:
